content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1540: Fearfully Barbarian

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Shi Yan’s power rocketed instantly but he didn’t attack Yuan yet. He maintained his previous position. Holding the star chain, he restrained Hui’s main head.

Deep in his eyes, blood-red energy gushed crazily and hit Hui deep in its Sea of Consciousness! That sort of energy had created soul pressure. Finally, the balance that Yuan had laboriously created was broken!

Zi Yao used her absolute advantage to counterattack Hui’s soul and use her soul to swallow Hui’s host soul!

Hui’s Sea of Consciousness had become a world filled with bands of dazzling light. The sparkling halos rippled like light waves in the sea at every corner.

Deep inside the brilliant sea of light was a magnificent, hovering, seven-colored soul altar. It was Hui’s soul altar with the blinding Divine Light power Upanishad, a territory, and a pocket-sized snake soul, which was Hui’s host soul.

At this moment, the dark green snake was affected by the black water and a red halo. It looked so helpless.

Zi Yao’s graceful soul turned into a bunch of purple light and coiled around the little green snake.

The little snake struggled hard. The snake body was slowly vanishing in the purple light. Quite the contrary, the purple light grew bigger and brighter at a speed that naked eyes could see. It was filled with energy!

That small snake was Hui’s host soul. While Zi Yao was backfiring it, she had taken a lot of mysterious images in its memories.

Zi Yao’s aura was completely similar to a snake; it wasn’t a problem to migrate the memories. It was as easy as water pulling the boat.

—————————-

Shi Yan’s ferocious, savage body observed and found that the struggling snake suddenly quieted down. He knew that they had gotten over the dangerous phrase. Zi Yao now had Hui’s host soul.

From now on, Hui’s time was over. Zi Yao was about to replace it and control this Absolute Beginning body!

Yuan’s energy was divided into three flows to control Dragon Lizard, Shi Yan, Zi Yao, and Neptune’s group. He had controlled the situation. Right at this moment, Yuan suddenly bellowed at the void. He crazily shared a greater part of his Soul Consciousness to subdue Zi Yao!

He didn’t want Hui to wake up or Zi Yao to take Hui’s soul. The changed situation threatened him. He had to retrieve the energy he used to fight Forefather Dragon Lizard and Neptune to help Hui counterattack Shi Yan and Zi Yao.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

He immediately retrieved his soul energy sent to the other snakes. After his restraint was gone, the other eleven soul clones of Hui hurried to attack Zi Yao.

The soul clones turned into small snakes, emerged in Hui’s soul, and furiously attacked Zi Yao!

However, after Zi Yao had taken in Hui’s host soul, she had also obtained its memories and powers. She was no longer the weak warrior that Hui could bully!

She had Hui’s powers!

Zi Yao suddenly transformed into a human with a snake body from the purple light. She urged her power Upanishad in Hui’s Sea of Consciousness. Shortly after, she steadied herself in this world of divine light. She could pull and control them all!

Bands of dazzling light crossed over this inner world and attacked the little snakes.

In this world, she was the only protagonist. Shi Yan’s Soul Consciousness in there also felt her intimidation.

Yuan was still roaring wildly. When Zi Yao got Hui’s host soul, his soul had tried to get in there. However, he was stopped outside by the divine light. He couldn’t intrude Zi Yao’s Sea of Consciousness to overturn the situation.

At the same time, Shi Yan recognized that Zi Yao was fighting the eleven clones in her Sea of Consciousness. He knew that he didn’t need to help her anymore.

He retrieved his Soul Consciousness and power. His formidable, giant body shook.

The giant dragon tattoo on his body suddenly moved. The world-destroying energy furiously diffused from him!

“Crack! Crack! Crack!”

The immense sea created by Yuan energy exploded and collapsed fast. It seemed like the ocean created by Water power Upanishad couldn’t resist such a power.

The current water level of the sea was now at Shi Yan’s waist. At first glance, it looked like he was standing in the middle of a small, shallow pond where a giant turtle that wasn’t bigger than him was swimming.

“Heavenly stars move!”

Shi Yan shouted. Skyfall Star River changed in the void and turned into thousands of bright stars. Each star revolved and created a dazzling light curtain. The light curtain created hundreds of strange, ancient formations, seals, and barriers, falling like waterfalls.

All were aimed at Yuan’s giant turtle body!

“Space confines!”

Space energy rippled. Wherever the space ripples went, the void froze. The giant turtle paused!

Boom!

Shi Yan ballooned like a Demogorgon that descended to this world while terrifying energy was emitting from him. He trodded on the giant turtle shell. The giant dragon tattoo on his body suddenly revived. The dragon opened the mouth as if it was smiling and moved towards the giant turtle!

“Desolate! You dipped your nose in my business!”

Yuan Zu’s human clone looked frightened for the first time. The giant turtle retracted into the shell.

The world on the turtle shell was put into a deep place in his territory. All the patterns on the turtle shell glowed and turned black.

THUMP!

Shi Yan’s stamp sounded like a hammer hitting a bronze drum. Yuan’s turtle shell made the sound of an earth-shaking explosion.

The giant dragon tattoo hit the patterns on the turtle shell and cracked it. Yuan screamed in agony.

“I will risk my life with you!”

Yuan Zu screamed and then ignored Neptune’s group, entering his real body. Yuan’s turtle body’s energy rocketed once more. The scattered energy all united.

Rumble! Rumble! Rumble!

Crack! Crack! Crack!

A Demogorgon whose head touched the void and feet trodded the darkness was fighting a giant turtle in the surging sea. They were using their power Upanishads to attack each other and their massive body to tear and bite each other.

Neptune, Xiao Lie, Jia Ni, and the others were released since Yuan had retrieved his power. Dragon Lizard lost his tail but he was saved when he was close to dying. Just like Neptune and the others, he was dazedly watching the two terrifying creatures entangling and biting each other.

“Is he really Shi Yan?”

Jia Ni’s patterned face showed her fear. She lifted her head to look at Shi Yan whose little toe was as big as a mountain. She was filled with fear.

“Yes. That’s him...” Neptune sounded bitter.

“I heard that you had almost killed him on the seabed of the Sea of Annihilation. I want to know if the rumors were true or not. You... you can defeat him?” Xiao Lie of Heavenly Craftsman Tribe asked frankly. He looked at Neptune skeptically and asked impolitely, “You think you can kill him now? Did you lose your mind while cultivating?”

Neptune looked embarrassed but he didn’t snap back.

Jia Ni of Secret Pattern Tribe had strange lights in her eyes as she complimented, “Yeah, he’s the one who has claimed Mei Ji’s heart. I didn’t know why the most beautiful flower of the Phantom Clan has fallen in love with an anonymous person. But now, I get it.”

She didn’t conceal her compliments. “What a hunk! Let alone Mei Ji, I think as long as you are a woman, your heart will pound hard as you watch this fight.”

“I think you should leave hurriedly.”

However, at this moment, Forefather Dragon Lizard’s voice arose. He floated from the seething ocean, his body gory and his face exhausted.

“You’re severely wounded,” said Xiao Lie.

“I won’t die yet. But if I stay here, I’m not sure about that.” Forefather Dragon Lizard pulled a cold face as he looked at the corpses of Labitte and Clark. “Whether it’s Shi Yan or Yuan Zu, when one becomes victorious, he will kill you all.”

“Which side did you choose?” Jia Ni was interested.

She didn’t even bat her eyes at Clark and Labitte. Apparently, she was that sort of heartless person.

“Side?” Forefather Dragon Lizard wore a strange face. He lifted his head to look at the overbearing Shi Yan in the void. He was scared.

He knew that Absolute Beginning creatures could eat each other to increase its power. As he got Lizard’s blood, he wondered if Shi Yan who had fallen into his bloody slaughtering desire would lose his mind and kill all the creatures here.

“Forget it. I don’t care about you. I have to get out of here!”

Pondering, he didn’t dare to take risks. As he felt that Shi Yan’s condition was not right, he didn’t want to stay. After talking to Neptune and the others, he dragged his bloody body away.

The battle between Shi Yan and Yuan continued. The giant and the turtle were hitting each other hard in the dark ocean. The shockwaves from their exploding energy broke many life stars around. This strange territory was about to collapse because of their battle!

Shi Yan alone couldn’t resist Yuan. However, after Desolate lent him energy, he could maintain an equal fight with Yuan.

Neptune’s team didn’t want to leave when they saw the two battling hard against each other. They hid in the dark and observed.

“Oh! That big snake isn’t moving anymore, is it?” Neptune was surprised and something flashed in his head. “This is our chance!”

The others checked and found that the twelve snakes of Hui stopped moving. Their eyes were also closed.
